package.name: go2_rl_control
package.description: ROS 2 nodes that run a Unitree Go2 RL policy (trained in IsaacLab via unitree_rl_lab). Provides: * rl_inference_node (C++ ament_cmake): ONNX policy + PD torque output * mujoco_sim_node (Python): standalone MuJoCo bridge for sim2sim * keyboard_teleop (Python): WASD/QE/123 -> /go2/cmd_vel, /go2/mode
